notes.text:

notes.message: ⚠️ W1P1 LinkedIn post FAILED + FIXED: Post cron fired 07:30am, approval gate PASSED (pre-approved by Ken). FAILED due to expired LinkedIn API version (202501 interpreted as 20250101). Yoda fixed: all LinkedIn scripts updated 202501→202503. Queue reset to status=approved. W1P2 cron (Wed 12pm) and W1P3 (Thu 7:30am) will use fixed version. ACTION: Ken to reply APPROVED to this standup note to trigger manual W1P1 retry, OR wait for Spark to handle next slot and W1P1 posts manually.
